scope.summary: Complete rich-message behavior already staged under rich-messages: stickers, reactions, quote/reply, link previews, and undo/delete events must render, persist, and route correctly. Also repair the text/quote send path so it uses the SessionManager throttle and preserves user/group thread kind.
goals: types/: StoredMessage and ChatMessage carry quote/link/reaction/deleted state in addition to sticker/text
store/: SQLite migration persists quote/link JSON, reaction emoji, and undo/deleted state; history reload reconstructs them
session/: text/quote send path reserves the same per-account throttle used by stickers and accepts ThreadKind
command/: send_message validates thread kind, delegates through SessionManager, and persists quote/link metadata
frontend: incoming reaction/undo events update an existing message instead of appending a blank pseudo-message; quote/link/reaction/deleted state renders in ChatPane
nonGoals: Custom reactions (standard Zalo emoji set only)

acceptance.description: cargo build compiles with rich-message persistence and throttled thread-kind-aware text/quote send.
clippy stays clean with warnings denied.
Offline Rust tests cover store reload for quote/link/reaction/undo and SessionManager throttling for text/quote.
Frontend type-checks and builds with rich-message state rendering.
Live reaction smoke remains valid after the routing/persistence repairs.
